headline: Tesla Semi Million Mile Battery Puts Freight Economics In Focus
summary: Tesla (NasdaqGS:TSLA) reports that the battery for its Semi truck is engineered to last 1 million miles. The company positions this battery as a way to support long term, economic freight operations for commercial fleets. The disclosure focuses on heavy duty trucking technology, separate from recent attention on chips, AI and potential corporate restructuring. Tesla, best known for passenger EVs, is also targeting commercial freight with the Tesla Semi, and the million mile battery claim...

content.summary: Tesla (NasdaqGS:TSLA) reports that the battery for its Semi truck is engineered to last 1 million miles. Tesla, best known for passenger EVs, is also targeting commercial freight with the Tesla Semi, and the million mile battery claim...

headline: BYD Signals It’s Confident Exports Will Beat 2026 Target By 15%
summary: (Bloomberg) -- BYD Co. signaled to analysts that exports this year will probably beat its previous target by 15%, according to people familiar with the matter, as the world’s biggest electric vehicle maker leans on growth in overseas markets to counter a slump in domestic sales. In an analyst briefing Monday following worse-than-expected fourth-quarter earnings, BYD management told participants that the automaker is confident exports will reach 1.5 million vehicles in 2026, said the people, who

headline: Big Tech Stocks Rout Is Flashing Signals of a Turnaround
summary: (Bloomberg) -- The wreckage in large technology stocks that sent the Nasdaq 100 Index into a correction is flashing signs that have marked turning points for the group in the past.Chief among the signals is how much of Big Tech’s valuation premium to the rest of the market has been erased. Such a compression has historically set the sector up for outperformance.After an 11% slide from its last record in October, the tech-focused gauge now trades at 21 times projected 12-month earnings, just 1.7

headline: Tesla Stock Could Break Its 6-Week Losing Streak. It All Comes Down to Thursday.
summary: Tesla  stock rose early Monday after failing to end its weekly losing streak on Friday.  Tesla stock dropped 2.8% on Friday, falling with most stocks, which left it down 1.7% for the week, the sixth consecutive weekly drop.  The week of Tesla’s better-than-expected fourth-quarter earnings report was the start of the downward streak.

headline: Elon Musk's xAI Loses Last Original Co-Founder Ahead Of SpaceX IPO: Report
summary: Elon Musk‘s last original co-founder at xAI, Ross Nordeen, has reportedly resigned. This marks the end of an era for the company, which is now undergoing a major reorganization as it prepares for a high-profile IPO. Last Original Co-Founder Departs xAI Nordeen, one of the 11 co-founders who helped launch xAI with Musk, has left the company, Business Insider reported, citing sources.
